title: UMC 幽法工艺 Underworld Magic Craftsmanship
body:
English version：
Some background information about this module
Follower: The whole body is pitch black, and it was born in the dark realm. Since there is no light in this realm, the Follower can only rely on sound to move.
Xunsheng Guard: Xunsheng Guard evolved from the ability of Xunsheng to obtain sound. After obtaining the power of sound, it completely loses its rationality and attacks the creatures that produce sound together. It can already control the sound to emit sound waves to attack the entities that produce sound.
Soundsmith: The weapon is forged by the power of sound obtained by the sound follower. The weapon possesses the power of sound and has initially acquired wisdom, which can now call on the sound follower to protect it.
Xunsheng Craftsman: Evolved from the power of sound collection obtained by sound craftsmen, he longs for sound and will pursue all places where sound is produced. He can collect these sounds. The object that collects sound is called a sound bottle, which can be used to collect sound and obtain a sound bottle
Yinxiao Guard: It is a high-level guard made by Xunsheng craftsmen using sound bottles to guard the ancient city of Shenghei.
The opposing forces to Shenghei Ancient City are Magnetic Sky Floating City and Magnetic Angel.
Currently added
Added fusion weapons, equipment, and tools (available);
Added lower bound fusion materials and their equipment (available);
Added some dropped items from the monitor (unavailable);
Added equipment from the Sound Roar series (unavailable);
Added element (unavailable).
Added Frost series equipment (unavailable);
Added some new materials (unavailable);
Added some new functional blocks (unavailable)
Added 2 types of creatures - Silent Zombies and Sound Roar Guardians (available);
Added plants, communities, and dimensions (currently being modified);
Added 1 summoning ritual (available);
Added some fusion materials (to enhance equipment strength) (available).
[View module details](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/14123.html)
中文版：
关于本模组的一些背景

循声者：全身漆黑，它诞生在暗界，由于此界没有光，循声者只能依靠声音，来移动。

循声守卫：循声守卫由循声者获得声音的能力进化而来，它获得声音的力量后彻底失去了理智，它会攻击一起产生声音的生物，它已经可以控制声音发出音波来对产生声音的实体进行攻击。

声匠：由循声者获得声音的力量来锻造武器，武器拥有音的力量，它初步拥有了智慧，已经可以呼唤循声者来保护它。

循声工匠：由声匠获得收集声音的力量进化而来，他渴望声音，他会追逐所有产生声音的地方，他可以把这些声音收集起来。（收集声音的物品叫收音瓶，可以用它收集到声音来获得音瓶）

音啸守卫：是由循声工匠用音瓶制造出来的高级护卫，用来守护声黑古城的。

与声黑古城对立势力是磁空浮城，磁力天使。

当前添加

添加了融合武器，装备以及工具（可用）；

添加了下界融合材料及其装备（可用）；

添加了一些来自监守者的掉落物（不可用）；

添加了音啸系列装备（不可用）；

添加了元素（不可用）。

添加了冰霜系列装备（不可用）；

添加了一些新的材料（不可用）；

添加了一些新的功能方块（不可用）

添加了 2 种生物——幽匿僵尸和音啸守卫（可用）；

添加了植物，群系，维度（正在修改）；

添加了 1 种召唤仪式（可用）；

添加了一些融合材料（用于提升装备强度）（可用）。

[查看模组详情](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/14123.html)
